results.title: India-New Zealand Sign 10 MoUs During PM Modi’s Visit; Set $7 Billion Trade Target By 2030
results.description: India and New Zealand signed 10 MoUs during PM Modi's visit and agreed to double bilateral trade to 7 billion US dollars by 2030. The two countries also decided to strengthen cooperation in defence, maritime security and counter-terrorism. The post India-New Zealand Sign 10 MoUs During PM Modi’s Visit; Set $7 Billion Trade Target By 2030 appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: Summer trail camera work can pay off in the fall
results.description: Some might wonder why a deer hunter would be running trail cameras this time of year, knowing deer season is still about three months away. But as trail cameras have grown in popularity over the years, taking a summer inventory of the local buck herd has become a passion for many deer hunters. The first thing I want to point out is that seeing bucks in July and August doesn't necessarily mean they'll be in those same locations during hunting season. The fact is, a whitetail buck behaves like a completely different animal once autumn arrives. Habitat changes, hunting pressure and the breeding season all influence where bucks travel and how they spend their days. So why bother taking inventory now? The answer is simple: while bucks often change their patterns in the fall, most don't move very far from where they spend the summer. Many shift only a mile or two, and some hardly move at all. Their daily routines change far more than their overall range. That's why I like finding bachelor groups of mature bucks during the summer. If I locate several good bucks using the same area in July and August, I know there's a good...
